channel.title: Tajaone - Leather Products Kenya
channel.description: High-quality, affordable leather bags, shoes & accessories in Kenya

item.title: Checkered Leather Handbag – Juan Luisa Edition
Urban Explorer Leather Duffel – Rugged Brown Finish
Mini Quilted Handbags – Assorted Colors with Tassel Detail
Premium Brown Leather Belt with Textured Diamond Pattern
Premium Brown Embossed Leather Belt – Silver Buckle
Elegant Brown Leather Shoes – Star Detail
Classic Leather Wallets – Black & Brown Collection

g:shipping.g:transit_time_label: Same-day within Nairobi, 2–5 business days countrywide

item.title: Classic Brown Leather Duffel – Full-Grain Kenyan Hide
